mm_changed.description: True iff the PR warrants a mental-model update (and the agent opened an [mm] PR for it).

mm_pr.description: URL or number of the opened [mm] PR when mm_changed; empty/absent otherwise.

questions.description: Gate questions. Emit EXACTLY ONE (asking a human to decide on the [mm] PR) when mm_changed is true; emit an EMPTY list when no MM change is warranted (the engine then auto-skips the gate straight to mrp).

rationale.description: Why an MM change is or is not warranted, grounded in the PR diff.
